initiatives.name: Harrisburg Mutual Aid Collective
initiatives.description: A grassroots network fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through direct support in Harrisburg. They coordinate resource sharing, community care initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through collective action and creating spaces for community resilience.

initiatives.name: TransCentralPA
initiatives.description: TransCentralPA is a not-for-profit organization dedicated to serving the transgender community in and around Central Pennsylvania. Operating out of Harrisburg.
